[@image:#1:ScreenShot_2026-03-29_152852_300] 现代极简符号型Logo设计，枫叶与“检”字负形同构设计，整体为标准对称五裂枫叶轮廓，边缘几何化处理，纯红色填充无渐变。枫叶内部采用负形构成“检”字结构：

“木”字作为主视觉中轴，竖笔加粗贯穿上下，形成稳定视觉骨架，两侧分叉对称展开，几何化处理；

“佥”字转化为抽象人形结构，上部为圆形头部，中部为展开的弧形双臂，下部与中轴自然收束融合，整体向上生长；

所有线条统一粗细，负形边界干净利落，无多余细节；

底部收口为圆润水滴状或盾形收束，增强稳定感与权威感；

整体构图对称平衡，视觉集中，风格现代、简洁、符号化强，具有检察机关权威感与品牌识别性，矢量风格，白色背景，无阴影，无渐变，无3D效果。
[@image:#1:B-FORNECIDA][@image:#2:Captura de tela 2026-03-26 162023] USE A LETRA B FORNECIDA , UMA SERIF ELEGANTE E CRIE UM LOGO COMO EDSSE QUE TEM UM OLHO NO MEIO.
[@image:#1:22fbfba76053f676fc28b6427d4b1aaf] 生成矢量图形的企业logo

Use the attached logo as the exact base and develop it into a stronger brand-ready version.

Keep:
- the same overall logo concept
- the two tilted capsule/ticket shapes
- the playful dynamic composition
- the main color idea
- the overall friendly and experiential feeling

Refine mainly the Hebrew title typography: "קפסולת הזמן".

Create a custom Hebrew wordmark that feels:
unique,
brand-specific,
rounded,
bold,
playful but controlled,
modern,
innovative,
and highly memorable.

Do not use a generic rounded Hebrew font.
Make it feel like the lettering was specially designed for this project.

Focus on giving distinctive personality to letters like:
ק, פ, ס, ת, ז, מ, ן

The typography should stay friendly and approachable, but feel much more iconic and branded.

Avoid:
childish cartoon style,
generic bubble font,
handwritten look,
ornamental tricks,
or overly decorative details.

The result should feel like a custom logo wordmark for a cultural-experiential Israeli project.

根据[@image:#1:6c9ee44b7ef6a706ca53926074a72bcf]的logo风格继续优化[@image:#2:Cloud Islander品牌logo]，并像[@image:#1:6c9ee44b7ef6a706ca53926074a72bcf]生成相关配套物料的品牌vi海报

参考[@image:#1:c457bd166e168bb3731d706a7993930a]的风格制作一个稚拙手绘风格的品牌logo：
品牌名：@Cloud Islander
参考品牌ip形象[@image:#2:4]
整体风格：侘寂风/日式极简手绘，自带「手账涂鸦感」，不是工整的矢量设计，而是像用粗马克笔/蜡笔随手画出来的

- 视觉气质：随性、慵懒、自然、有呼吸感
1. 线条与图案：随性的「稚拙感」
 
- 线条特点：不用平滑的曲线，故意画得“歪歪扭扭”，粗细不均匀，像小朋友随手画的一样，拒绝完美对称

- 图案逻辑： 用极简的符号化图形，体现品牌元素[@image:#2:4]

- 图形不用写实，用最简化的轮廓，甚至有点“抽象”也没关系

- 图案和文字不是分开的，而是互相穿插、融合（比如文字的笔画延伸成图案，或者图案和文字连在一起）
 
2. 文字处理：手写体+图形化
 
- 字体选择：选无衬线的手写体，笔画要圆润、随意，大小写混用也没关系，字母可以歪着写，可以拆开放在图形的周围，不是规规矩矩排成一行

[@image:#1: Image][@image:#2: Image]根据图片logo设计风格，重新设计logo：黑白：设计内核：鱼篓是最直接呼应“摸鱼”的传统旧物，同时它也是装载的容器。 图形解构：提取竹编鱼篓的“交叉编织纹理”。用现代化的网格线（Grid）或者几根交叉的斜线来代表鱼篓的抽象结构。 摸鱼意象（线条融合）：线条的下半部分是规整的网格（鱼篓），但线条向上延伸时，突然变得柔和灵动，交织成一片极简的茶叶，或者一条鱼的流线型轮廓。仿佛是鱼从规矩的网格中跃出。，竹篓中有"摸鱼儿”品牌名中某一个字的字形进行结合

这是我们公司的 Logo [@image:#1:Vintage™][@image:#2:字母R]，基于这个 Logo 创建一套品牌的VI以及周边应用，包含ppt模版

Dark circular profile artwork with the same strong composition structure as a premium urban logo design. Central giant typography dominating the layout, bold condensed letters with massive presence, reading “ADM 2D”. Graffiti street-art style instead of clean modern style. Letters made with spray paint texture, drips, rough edges, wall paint imperfections, layered tags, stencil marks and handstyle details. Background deep black mixed with concrete wall texture, cracked cement, subtle bricks and urban alley atmosphere. Blue neon graffiti palette with electric blue, royal blue and white highlights. Top center a stylized crown drawn like street graffiti spray tag. Middle of composition crossed by a cracked line / fracture effect. Around the design include urban elements: paint splashes, marker tags, scribbles, spray mist, stickers, scratches, halftone dots, layered posters torn on wall, subtle smoke. Side accents with Japanese calligraphy graffiti tags. Bottom area contains a modern WhatsApp contact bar integrated into the art. Strong depth, layered textures, cinematic shadows, glowing blue accents, premium streetwear identity style, aggressive and exclusive visual branding, ultra detailed, high contrast, centered composition, profile picture ready, circular framing. Art reference attached. [@image:#1:image]
